name: Integration - End-to-End Email Analysis Workflow
description: Tests the integration of EmailIngestionService, EmailAnalysisEngine, LLMService, OutputFormatter, and AuditLogger in EmailPhishingDetectionAgent.analyze_emails for a batch of emails.
input: A list of 2 RawEmail instances: one phishing, one not suspicious.
output: AnalyzeEmailsResponse with results for both emails, including correct classification and explanations.
success_criteria: All services are invoked in sequence
AuditLogger logs rule triggers and errors
LLMService returns a response for each email
OutputFormatter produces ClassificationResult for each email
error_scenarios: Exception in any service results in classification='inconclusive' for that email
AuditLogger fallback logging if primary fails
